title: Problem Set 1: Mash Chemistry
description: Solve the starch-conversion and gelatinization problems. Calculate expected fermentable sugar yield for the given grain bill and mash temperature.

title: Problem Set 2: Enzyme Kinetics
description: Complete the Michaelis-Menten problems for alpha- and beta-amylase. Plot reaction rate vs substrate concentration and estimate Km and Vmax.

title: Quiz: Yeast Pitching Rate
description: What pitching rate in cells per mL per degree Plato is recommended for a standard ale fermentation?

title: Lab Report: Yeast Propagation
description: Write up your yeast starter lab. Report cell counts viability and growth curve and discuss sources of contamination risk.

title: Lab Report: Lactic Vegetable Ferment
description: Document your kimchi or sauerkraut ferment. Include brine percentage pH curve over time and sensory observations.

title: Lab Report: Koji Incubation
description: Report your rice or soybean koji run. Include temperature and humidity logs mold coverage assessment and enzyme activity notes.

title: Sensory Analysis Project Proposal
description: Propose the fermented product you will evaluate for the sensory project. Define your attributes panel design and scoring approach.

title: Lab Report: Small-Batch Distillation
description: Write up your pot-still run. Report mash ABV cut temperatures collected volumes and final proof with sensory notes per cut.

title: Final Exam Practice Set
description: Complete the practice problems covering mash chemistry cultures koji lactic fermentation and distillation. Show all work.

title: Lab Report: Sanitation & Aseptic Technique
description: Document your sanitizer dilution and aseptic transfer exercise. Report contamination plate results and discuss SOP adherence.

title: Quiz: Sanitizer Contact Time
description: Answer in the lab log - what minimum contact time is required for the no-rinse sanitizer used in the FS 572 lab?

title: Lab Report: Brine & pH Tracking
description: Build your lactic ferment data table. Track pH and titratable acidity over the fermentation and present consistent results across samples.

title: Lab Report: Yeast Fermentation Curve
description: Build a fermentation tracking workup using gravity readings over time. Calculate apparent attenuation and estimated ABV.

title: Lab Report: Koji Process Log
description: Create your koji process log. Record inoculation incubation turning and harvest with photos and observations.

title: Lab Report: Distillation Cuts
description: Build a distillation summary table for each cut by temperature volume and ABV and show the proofing calculation.

title: Final Lab Portfolio
description: Revise and compile all your lab reports into a final portfolio with corrected data tables and a reflection on sanitation practice.

title: Reading Response: Microbial Metabolism
description: Write a short response on the metabolic pathways discussion. Explain glycolysis and the role of pyruvate in fermentation. Complete all 20 short items.

title: Quiz: Homofermentative vs Heterofermentative
description: Explain the difference between homofermentative and heterofermentative lactic bacteria. Give one example product for each.

title: Seminar: Flavor Compound Diagrams
description: Diagram the formation pathways for three fermentation flavor compounds: esters diacetyl and acetic acid. Label precursors and conditions.

title: Term Paper: Fermented Product
description: Write a research paper on a fermented product of your choice covering its microbiology process and food-safety considerations. Cite at least 3 sources.

title: Sensory Analysis Presentation
description: Create a 5-minute presentation on your sensory analysis of a fermented product. Include your panel results and flavor profile.

title: Day 3 Koji Bloom Photos - Upload
description: Upload all macro photographs from Day 3 koji incubation. Include raw and labeled images. Label each tray by substrate and rice lot.
